memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: CloudSave

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: CloudSave

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, bool bSetPublic, const FJsonObject &RecordRequest, const FVoidHandler &OnSuccess, const FErrorHandler &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a user-level record with Metadata input value. This method appends to existing records. To replace an existing record please use ReplaceUserRecord.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
Metadata is_public value and set by client
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FJsonObject RecordRequest, bool IsPublic, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Save a user-level record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one. To replace an existing record please use ReplaceUserRecord.

detaileddescription.para: The end point of this method if bIsPublic is true (using suffix /public) will be deprecated in future

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
Save the record as a public/private record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetPublicUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key and userId in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
UserId of the record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, const TArray< FString > &UserIds, THandler< FListAccelByteModelsUserRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key and userId in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
List UserId(s) of the record owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &Keys, THandler< FListAccelByteModelsUserRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetUserRecords

briefdescription.para: Bulk get records (arbitrary JSON data) by list of keys.

parameterdescription.para: List Key of record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, bool bSetPublic, const FJsonObject &RecordRequest, const FVoidHandler &OnSuccess, const FErrorHandler &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one. To append an existing record please use SaveUserRecord.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
Metadata is_public value and set by client
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FJsonObject RecordRequest, bool IsPublic, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one. To append an existing record please use SaveUserRecord.

detaileddescription.para:
The end point of this method if bIsPublic is true (using suffix /public) will be deprecated in future
Key
Key of record.
RecordRequest
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
IsPublic
Save the record as a public/private record.
OnSuccess
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
OnError
This will be called when the operation failed.
AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FDateTime const LastUpdated, FJsonObjectWrapper RecordRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecordCheckLatest

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one, but will failed if lastUpdated is not up-to-date.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
last time the record is updated. Retrieve it from GetGameRecord.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (int TryAttempt, FString const &Key, FJsonObjectWrapper RecordRequest, THandlerPayloadModifier< FJsonObjectWrapper, FJsonObjectWrapper > const &PayloadModifier, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecordCheckLatest

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one. Beware: Function will try to get the latest value, put it in the custom modifier and request to replace the record. will retry it again when the record is updated by other user, until exhaust all the attempt.

parameterdescription.para: Attempt to try to replace the game record.
Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
Function to modify the latest record value with your customized modifier.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FDateTime LastUpdated, FJsonObjectWrapper RecordRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsReplaceUserRecordResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecordCheckLatest

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one, but will failed if lastUpdated is not up-to-date.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
last time the record is updated. Retrieve it from GetGameRecord.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsReplaceUserRecordResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (int TryAttempt, FString const &Key, FJsonObjectWrapper RecordRequest, THandlerPayloadModifier< FJsonObjectWrapper, FJsonObjectWrapper > const &PayloadModifier, THandler< FAccelByteModelsReplaceUserRecordResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ReplaceUserRecordCheckLatest

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one. Beware: Function will try to get the latest value, put it in the custom modifier and request to replace the record. will retry it again when the record is updated by other user, until exhaust all the attempt.

parameterdescription.para: Attempt to try to replace the game record.
Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
Function to modify the latest record value with your customized modifier.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsReplaceUserRecordResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Key, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Delete a record under the given key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Save a namespace-level record. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record, if already exists, it will append to the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.

This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in namespace-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
The request of the record with JSON formatted.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

parameterdescription.para: Key of record.
last time the record is updated. Retrieve it from GetGameRecord.

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in namespace-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one. Beware: Function will try to get the latest value, put it in the custom modifier and request to replace the record. will retry it again when the record is updated by other user, until exhaust all the attempt.

parameterdescription.para: Attempt to try to replace the game record.
Key of record.

briefdescription.para: Bulk get game records (arbitrary JSON data) by list of keys.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedBulkGetPublicUserRecordKeysResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: BulkGetOtherPlayerPublicRecordKeys

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the public key record for a user in bulk.

parameterdescription.para: UserId of the keys owner.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedBulkGetPublicUserRecordKeysResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the cloudsave result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the cloudsave result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedBulkGetPublicUserRecordKeysResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: BulkGetCurrentPlayerPublicRecordKeys

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the public key record for current user in bulk.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedBulkGetPublicUserRecordKeysResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the cloudsave result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the cloudsave result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &Keys, THandler< FListAccelByteModelsUserRecord > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkGetOtherPlayerPublicRecords

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the public record for a user in bulk using public keys.

parameterdescription.para: UserId of the keys owner.
List Key of record.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FListAccelByteModelsUserRecord&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
